features: MULTIPLE COLORS: The hair bands have 10 different colors, each color has 5pcs. The colors are Grass green, purple, sky blue, pink, black, fluorescent yellow, red, fluorescent orange, brown, rose red. Different color hair bands can satisfy your different collocations.

HIGH-QUALITY: The hair bands are made of premium quality polyester and rubber. The hair bands are of good quality, not easily broken, and durable. The elastic hair band has strong elasticity and can hold the hair tightly.
DIMENSION: The thickness of hair bands is 4mm. The stretch length is approximately 21cm/8.26inch in longest.

EASY TO CARRY: The hair bands are very lightweight, it is easy to take them anywhere. When the hair band is not tied, it can be worn as a bracelet on the hand. The decoration is very good, and there is no heavy feeling.

WIDELY APPLICATION: Suitable for various occasions, such as parties, ceremonies, offices, schools, travel, etc. They are very suitable for everyday makeup, with a variety of hairstyles, curly hair, straight hair, ponytail.
description: Product Description Directions Pull the hair tie through your hair to the desired length. Adjust the tightness to ensure a secure hold without causing discomfort. For a ponytail, gather your hair at the desired height and wrap the hair tie around it. For a bun, gather your hair at the crown of your head and wrap the hair tie around it, then tuck the ends into the hair tie. For a braid, secure each section of the braid with a hair tie. To avoid damaging your hair, avoid using the hair ties too tightly and remove them gently. Store the hair ties in a cool, dry place to maintain their elasticity. Hair Bands Color: Grass green, purple, sky blue, pink, black, fluorescent yellow, red, fluorescent orange, brown, rose red. Size: thickness: 4mm/0.16inch Perimeter: 14.5cm/5.7inch Quantity: 50pcs Material: Polyester and rubber Package includes: 1 x Set of 50pcs Hair Bands
